appointment_policies.same_day_availability: Call clinic directly at (816) 555-0000 before 9 AM
appointment_policies.cancellation_policy: Cancel at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a $50 fee
appointment_policies.reschedule_policy: Rescheduling is free if done more than 24 hours in advance via the patient portal or by calling us
appointment_policies.telehealth_note: Telehealth visits are available for established patients for follow-ups, minor illness, and prescription refills

call_911_symptoms: stroke symptoms (face drooping, arm weakness, speech difficulty)

urgent_care_locations.name: CareNow Urgent Care - Lee's Summit
urgent_care_locations.address: 770 NW Blue Pkwy, Lee's Summit, MO 64086

prescription_policy.controlled_substance_note: Controlled substances require an in-person visit every 90 days
prescription_policy.prior_auth_process: Our team will submit prior authorization within 2 business days. You will be notified by phone and portal message.
